zh.Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Eng: 英國諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋
zh.lifeSummary: 當William Blakiston of Gibside於1490年出生在英國達勒姆時，他的父親William Blakiston Esq25歲，母親Anne Conyers24歲。他於大約1520年與Eleanor Millott結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1561年1月15日在英國諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋享年71歲。

zh-hans.Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Eng: 英国諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Blakiston of Gibside于1490年出生在英国達勒姆时，他的父亲William Blakiston Esq25岁，母亲Anne Conyers24岁。他于大约1520年与Eleanor Millott结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1561年1月15日在英国諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋享年71岁。

nameMeanings.name: Blakiston
meanings: Blaec, black, isc, signifying likeness, and tun, town, meaning a blackish town

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When William Blakiston of Gibside was born in 1490, in Durham, England, his father, William Blakiston Esq, was 25 and his mother, Anne Conyers, was 24. He married Eleanor Millott about 1520. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 15 January 1561, in Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, England, at the age of 71.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Blakiston of Gibside est né en 1490, à Durham, Angleterre, son père, William Blakiston Esq, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Anne Conyers, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Eleanor Millott environ 1520. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 15 janvier 1561, à Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 71 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Blakiston of Gibside 1490 in Durham, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Blakiston Esq 25 und seine Mutter Anne Conyers 24. Er hat um 1520 Eleanor Millott geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 15. Januar 1561 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Blakiston of Gibside è nato il nel 1490 nel Durham, England, il suo padre, William Blakiston Esq, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Anne Conyers, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Eleanor Millott circa 1520. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 15 gennaio 1561, nel Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, England, all'età di 71 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William Blakiston of Gibsideが1490年にイギリスダルハムで生まれた時，父William Blakiston Esqは25歳，母Anne Conyersは24歳であった。約1520年にEleanor Millottと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1561年1月15日にイギリスノースウンバーランドニューカストル ウプオン トインで71歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Blakiston of Gibside(이)가 1490년 영국 뒤람에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Blakiston Esq(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Anne Conyers(은)는 24세였다. 그는 대략 1520년 Eleanor Millott(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1561년 1월 15일 영국 노르스벌랜드 뉴카스틀 업 타이니에서 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Eng: Newcastle upon Tyne, Norðhymbra land, Английн

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Blakiston of Gibside nasceu em 1490, em Durham, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Blakiston Esq, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Anne Conyers, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Eleanor Millott aproximadamente 1520. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 15 de janeiro de 1561, em Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Inglaterra, com 71 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Blakiston of Gibside родился в 1490 г. в местности дурам, Англия, его отцу по имени William Blakiston Esq было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne Conyers, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Eleanor Millott около 1520 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 15 января 1561 г. в местности нюкастл упон тин, нортумбирланд, Англия в возрасте 71 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Blakiston of Gibside nació en 1490, en Durham, Inglaterra, su papá, William Blakiston Esq, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Anne Conyers, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Eleanor Millott aproximadamente 1520. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 15 de enero de 1561, en Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 71 años.
